form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was well back in the run when 8th (Fr4) over 1720m at this track, at the bell was 8th-14.3 beaten 19 m by Enzed Flyer (2:07.10) in NR up to 35 on March 15 at $41. Before that 9th (Sr1) over 2260m at Bathurst beaten 50 m by Follow The Eclipse (2:47.70) in NR up to 47 on February 18 at $151. Draws the inside but it has been a long while between drinks so happy to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position at the start.
Broke after the start and took no competitive part in the event.
Held up for clear racing room over the final 75m.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr2) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 4th-8 beaten 11 m by Letstacoboutit (2:14.30) in NR up to 33 on March 31 at $2.60. Before that, 9th (Fr3) over 1720m after racing wide at this track, beaten 45 m by Enzed Flyer (2:07.10) in NR up to 35 on March 15 at $26. Has a better draw this time so could make amends.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 9th (Fr6) over 1660m at Parkes, beaten 8 m by Rock Queen (2:06.60) in NR up to 38 on April 4 at $13. form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Paddy Mach at Young over 1720m in a NR up to 37 on March 24 at $3.40. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Rock Queen at Parkes over 1660m in a NR up to 38 on April 4 at $13. Among the better chances.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 3rd (Sr4) over 1660m at Parkes, beaten a head by Rock Queen (2:06.60) in NR up to 38 on April 4 at $7. Nice effort last time. With even luck is a winning chance.
